purpose: Validate required columns and plausible units
method: Check presence of time temperature magnetization field and finite ranges
pass_criteria: All required columns present and finite-rate checks pass

method: Compare parsed filename field/mass against header or sidecar metadata when available
pass_criteria: Mismatch rate below configured tolerance and provenance recorded
failure_action: Flag blocker and fail strict mode

method: Record per-file import status and counts in table

purpose: Ensure cleaning does not dominate signal
method: Compute removed/replaced/interpolated fractions and long-gap flags
pass_criteria: Cleaning fractions below configured limits or justified in report
failure_action: Mark WARNING or FAIL depending on severity

method: Compare cleaning metrics above and below threshold and branch outputs
pass_criteria: Policy explicitly declared and impact bounded
failure_action: Fail if undeclared or unbounded divergence

method: Compute dt distribution and compare against assumed first-step dt model
pass_criteria: Irregularity metric below threshold or adaptive model used
failure_action: Disable segmentation and fail strict mode

method: Run small neighborhood sweep of delta_T and min_temp_change
pass_criteria: Segment-level observables remain within tolerance bands
failure_action: Mark unstable and block canonical release

purpose: Validate scaling outputs M_over_H M_per_mass M_per_Co
method: Check finite values no divide-by-zero no impossible magnitudes
pass_criteria: Derived metrics finite and within physical bounds
